title: Lightly Indulgent French Mixed Grain Gougere
description: A French-inspired choux gougere featuring a mix of grains and snappy pickle flavors. Perfect for a vegetarian snack or light lunch.

ingredients.name: grains (such as wheat berries, rye, and oats)
pickle juice
ingredients.notes: Use a mixture of dill and sweet pickle juices

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, grains, and salt.
Add the softened butter and mix until the dough resembles coarse crumbs.
Add the pickle juice, Gruyère cheese (if using), and mix until the dough is smooth.
Add the egg and mix until the dough is fully incorporated.
Transfer the dough to a piping bag fitted with a large round tip.
Pipe the dough onto a greased tava or griddle, forming small balls about 1 inch in diameter.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the gougere are puffed and golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
